final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic illustration of the Lantern Festival in Tang Dynasty Chang'an, a traditional Chinese scroll painting.

Style/medium: meticulous gongbi heavy-color painting (工笔重彩), traditional Chinese handscroll format, Song Dynasty court painting influence
Composition: wide panoramic bird's-eye view, sweeping horizontal scroll perspective, multiple narrative vignettes arranged in depth layers
Subject: Tang Dynasty Chang'an city during Lantern Festival, thousands of lantern displays of various shapes and sizes, crowds in traditional Hanfu, palace architecture, market streets
Scene/backdrop: Tang Chang'an cityscape at night, imperial palace in the distance, bustling West Market, lantern-lit streets stretching to the horizon
Lighting/mood: warm golden glow from countless lanterns illuminating the night sky, festive and celebratory atmosphere
Color palette: rich mineral pigments in vermilion, azurite blue, malachite green, gold leaf accents on lanterns, deep indigo night sky
Materials/textures: silk scroll texture, visible brushwork in gongbi style, layered ink washes for atmospheric depth
Text (verbatim): "唐代长安城元宵灯会全景，万盏花灯照亮夜空，工笔重彩长卷"
Constraints: must maintain traditional Chinese scroll painting proportions and composition; no anachronistic elements
Avoid: Western perspective systems; anime/manga style; photographic realism; modern lighting effects; generic fantasy aesthetic
